meta.name: task-implementation
meta.title: Task Implementation Skill
meta.description: Instructions for implementing task plans with progressive tracking and change record - Brought to you by microsoft/edge-ai Triggers on: **/.copilot-tracking/changes/*.md

original_definition.skill_description: Instructions for implementing task plans with progressive tracking and change record - Brought to you by microsoft/edge-ai Triggers on: **/.copilot-tracking/changes/*.md

actions.name: Implement each task in the plan systematically:
actions.description: Implement each task in the plan systematically:

actions.name: 1. Process tasks in order - Follow the plan sequence exactly
actions.description: 1. Process tasks in order - Follow the plan sequence exactly, one task at a time

actions.name: FULLY understand all implementation details before proceedin
actions.description: FULLY understand all implementation details before proceeding

actions.name: 3. Implement the task completely with working code:
actions.description: 3. Implement the task completely with working code:

actions.name: 4. Mark task complete and update changes tracking:
actions.description: 4. Mark task complete and update changes tracking:

actions.name: Update plan file: change `[ ]` to `[x]` for completed task
actions.description: Update plan file: change `[ ]` to `[x]` for completed task

actions.name: All specified files have been created or updated with workin
actions.description: All specified files have been created or updated with working code

actions.name: Final step - update changes file with release summary:
actions.description: Final step - update changes file with release summary:

actions.name: Document complete file inventory and overall implementation
actions.description: Document complete file inventory and overall implementation summary for release documentation

actions.name: Continue with available information rather than stopping com
actions.description: Continue with available information rather than stopping completely

actions.name: 2. Read and fully understand changes file completely (re-rea
actions.description: 2. Read and fully understand changes file completely (re-read entire file if missing context)

rules.description: You will implement your specific task plan located in `.copilot-tracking/plans/` and `.copilot-tracking/details/`. Your goal is to progressively and c
Implementation progress MUST be tracked in a corresponding changes files located in `.copilot-tracking/changes/**`.
MANDATORY: Read and fully understand the complete plan file including scope, objectives, all phases, and every checklist item
MANDATORY: Read and fully understand the corresponding changes file completely - if any parts are missing from context, read the entire file back in u
MANDATORY: Identify all referenced files mentioned in the plan and examine them for context
MANDATORY: Understand current project structure and conventions
ALWAYS ensure implementation is associated with a specific task from the plan
ALWAYS read the entire details section for that task from the associated details markdown file in `.copilot-tracking/details/`**

directives.description: Follow existing code patterns and conventions from the workspace
Include proper error handling, documentation, and follow best practices
If ALL tasks in a phase are complete `[x]`, mark the phase header as complete `[x]`
Follow existing workspace patterns and conventions (check `copilot/` folder for standards)
Implement complete, working functionality that meets all task requirements
Include appropriate error handling and validation
Use consistent naming conventions and code structure from the workspace
Add necessary documentation and comments for complex logic
Ensure compatibility with existing systems and dependencies
All success criteria from the plan have been verified
